title: planchonella oxyedra
intro: Planchonella oxyedra, also known as the 'Red Bead Tree', is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. The plant is native to New Caledonia and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Planchonella oxyedra include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate skin conditions, and provide relief from respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments.
